meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Freelance Pitching to Solve Stuck Projects
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' barrier. Learn to pitch freelance AI projects using Antigravity and Claude Code to build a professional portfolio.
content.answer_block: Stop building tutorial clones and start solving real business problems. By pitching freelance AI services, you transform your coding skills into high-value assets. Use Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for iterative development to deliver production-grade software that validates your expertise and launches your career as a professional AI builder.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks in tutorial hell, churning out identical to-do lists and weather apps. The screen stares back with the same familiar, hollow success. You have the skills, but your portfolio is invisible to the market because it lacks the one thing that matters: real-world utility.

The breakthrough isn't in another course—it's in the pitch. When you pivot from student to consultant, the code you write changes. It becomes robust, secure, and business-focused. This guide is your blueprint for escaping the cycle of basic apps by leveraging elite tools to build high-impact freelance solutions.

steps.title: Identify the High-Value Gap
steps.description: Find a local business with a manual workflow issue. Use Antigravity to map out the data flow and identify where an AI agent can save them 10+ hours a week.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the workflow of a local small business owner managing inventory via spreadsheets. Identify 3 specific friction points where an AI-driven automation could save time and suggest a technical architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'create a project roadmap for automating inventory management using Python and Supabase'

steps.title: Draft the Value-Based Pitch
steps.description: Don't sell code; sell outcomes. Create a pitch deck that focuses on ROI rather than your tech stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a concise, high-conversion email pitch for a business owner. Focus on the ROI of automating their inventory workflow. Use an authoritative but helpful tone.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'draft a cold outreach email template focusing on ROI for a local business owner'

steps.title: Rapid Prototyping with Antigravity
steps.description: Build the core engine of the solution. Focus on the 'happy path' to demonstrate value immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular Python script using LangChain to process inventory data and output a summary report. Ensure error handling is robust.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'scaffold a Python project structure with requirements.txt and a basic main.py'

steps.title: Iterative Development with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to refine your logic and add edge-case handling, treating your CLI as your senior pair programmer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and suggest optimizations for API rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'refactor the database interaction layer to be more efficient and add logging'

steps.title: Deployment and Client Handoff
steps.description: Package your app for the client. Ensure the documentation is clean so they can operate it without needing your constant support.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a user-friendly README.md for a non-technical client, explaining how to run the automation tool and what to do if an error occurs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'create a deployment script to containerize the app using Docker'

pro_tips: Always include a 'kill switch' in your AI agents so clients can stop expensive API calls instantly.
Charge by the business outcome, not the hour. A $500 tool that saves $5,000 is a steal.
Use environment variables for everything; never hardcode an API key, even in a small demo.
Record a 2-minute Loom video walking through the code; it builds more trust than a 10-page document.
Build a 'maintenance contract' into your pitch; it's recurring revenue for you and peace of mind for them.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, document the results in a case study for your portfolio and reach out to three more businesses in the same niche.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. You have the tools to change your trajectory today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
